titleStmt.title: Letter from Annie Schilling to the Office of the Irish Council, 3 July 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Annie Schilling

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Letter from Annie Schilling to the Office of the Irish Council. This letter is concerned with tracing the whereabouts of one Charles Kavanagh from Keady, county Armagh. In the letter it is stated that Annie Schilling does not wish Charles Kavanagh to know that she has been trying to find out about him.

msIdentifier.collection: Chief Secretary’s Office Registered papers, CSO-RP-1916-5615-11237

correspAction.placeName: 263 West 20th Street, New York City, New York, USA

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
3 - V11 - 16 263 West 20th St New York City U S A To the Office of The Irish Council Ireland Dear Sir Will you please let me
know if Charles Kavanagh
of Keady Co. Armagh is still
living also country residence
Athrugurgin and Armagh as
I don't hear anything from him
I have to use this means to find
out about him he is very old
and if his is still living I don't
wish him to know that I am
trying to find out anything
about him also Please send me
his Counsals name and address
as I would like very much
to have it hoping this will
be agreeable to you and that
you will let me hear from
you at your earliest convenience
I remain very
respectfully
Mrs Annie Schilling 263 West 20th St New York City U S A
